projects.summary: Functional near-infrared spectroscopy system for brain imaging research. Uses multichannel optical signals that need motion artifact rejection.
DTU thesis project: a reflectance pulse oximeter. Needs to separate pulsatile AC component from baseline DC drift across multiple wavelengths.

notes: Two matches expected, both with specific rationales: PCA on multichannel optical signals for fnirs, and PCA for AC/DC separation across wavelengths for pulse oximeter.
